revision.comment: Added the page to [[:Category:Module documentation pages]]
revision.text: {{high use}} {{Lua|Module:Arguments|Module:Yesno|Module:Text}} Lua to determine whether a string is singular or plural. Designed for use in infoboxes, to determine whether labels should be singular or plural based on the corresponding data, e.g. {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} → {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} *See [[Template:Detect singular]] for main() usage. Test cases [[Template:Detect singular/testcases|here]]. *See [[Template:Pluralize from text]] for pluralize() usage (a wrapper around main()). Test cases [[Template:Pluralize from text/testcases|here]]. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Infobox modules]] }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]]

{{high use}} {{Lua|Module:Arguments|Module:Yesno|Module:Text}} Lua to determine whether a string is singular or plural. Designed for use in infoboxes, to determine whether labels should be singular or plural based on the corresponding data, e.g. {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} → {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} *See [[Template:Detect singular]] for main() usage. Test cases [[Template:Detect singular/testcases|here]]. *See [[Template:Pluralize from text]] for pluralize() usage (a wrapper around main()). Test cases [[Template:Pluralize from text/testcases|here]]. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Infobox modules]] }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{high use}} {{Lua|Module:Arguments|Module:Yesno|Module:Text}} Lua to determine whether a string is singular or plural. Designed for use in infoboxes, to determine whether labels should be singular or plural based on the corresponding data, e.g. {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} → {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} *See [[Template:Detect singular]] for main() usage. Test cases [[Template:Detect singular/testcases|here]]. *See [[Template:Pluralize from text]] for pluralize() usage (a wrapper around main()). Test cases [[Template:Pluralize from text/testcases|here]]. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Infobox modules]] }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Detect singular/doc]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{high use}} {{Lua|Module:Arguments|Module:Yesno|Module:Text}} Lua to determine whether a string is singular or plural. Designed for use in infoboxes, to determine whether labels should be singular or plural based on the corresponding data, e.g. {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} → {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} *See [[Template:Detect singular]] for main() usage. Test cases [[Template:Detect singular/testcases|here]]. *See [[Template:Pluralize from text]] for pluralize() usage (a wrapper around main()). Test cases [[Template:Pluralize from text/testcases|here]]. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Infobox modules]] }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]] [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[en:Detect singular/doc]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Fixing the bad interwiki on a template

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{high use}} {{Lua|Module:Arguments|Module:Yesno|Module:Text}} Lua to determine whether a string is singular or plural. Designed for use in infoboxes, to determine whether labels should be singular or plural based on the corresponding data, e.g. {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} → {{#invoke:Detect singular|pluralize|Wynken, Blynken, and Nod||singular|plural}} *See [[Template:Detect singular]] for main() usage. revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{high use}} {{Lua|Module:Arguments|Module:Yesno|Module:Text}} Lua to determine whether a string is singular or plural.
